title: Subqueries in FROM clause not accepted
poc: CREATE TABLE SALESMART (PRICE INT, ITEM INT, CATEGORY INT, CITY INT, REGION INT, COUNTRY INT);
SELECT SUM(PRICE) as PRICE, ITEM, CATEGORY, CITY, REGION, COUNTRY FROM SALESMART S WHERE S.PRICE IN (SELECT MAX(price) as MAXPRICE FROM SALESMART) GROUP BY ITEM, CATEGORY, CITY, REGION, COUNTRY;
key_bug_features: Subqueries in FROM clause not accepted
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE SALESMART (PRICE INT NOT NULL, ITEM VARCHAR(50), CATEGORY VARCHAR(50), CITY VARCHAR(50), REGION VARCHAR(50), COUNTRY VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO SALESMART (PRICE, ITEM, CATEGORY, CITY, REGION, COUNTRY) VALUES (100, 'Item1', 'Category1', 'City1', 'Region1', 'Country1');
INSERT INTO SALESMART (PRICE, ITEM, CATEGORY, CITY, REGION, COUNTRY) VALUES (200, 'Item2', 'Category2', 'City2', 'Region2', 'Country2');
SELECT SUM(PRICE) AS TOTAL_PRICE, ITEM, CATEGORY FROM SALESMART S WHERE ITEM IN (SELECT ITEM FROM SALESMART WHERE PRICE > 150) GROUP BY ITEM, CATEGORY;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SALESMART WHERE PRICE IS NULL;
